title: Had I Have One More Envelope to Write
preview: A nostalgic scent came to mind, an old tale which began to uncover itself to the surface of heart.

title: Sunflower
preview: A box she once told him never to open waited in the closet since childhood, holding a promise, an old friend, and a field of sunflowers that never stopped blooming.

title: ボイジャーX
preview: 人類初の宇宙探査機「ボイジャーX」。星々のそばを泳ぐという夢を実現するための宇宙への航海の始まりは、宇宙に浮かぶ死体のように無残な姿となり、壊れてしまった。
